retrieved_result: Shoulder Strain Shoulder Strain Definition Shoulder pain is a common malady that becomes more common with age. Description Most of us go from day to day without giving a thought as to how we use our shoulders. But anyone who has experienced shoulder pain knows just how important the joint is to daily living. Causes
